description: Leah Heilpern hosts the final session of Binance's Responsible Trading Summer Camp, focusing on securing cryptocurrency. Experts share tips on protecting personal information and choosing the right platforms. A $10,000 prize is available for eligible viewers who register and complete a quiz. The session includes security advice from Daniel at Binance, emphasizing the importance of unique passwords, Google Authenticator, clean devices, and not carrying all cryptocurrency on mobile devices.
topic_summary: In this session, experts discuss strategies for securing cryptocurrency, including email protection, using Google Authenticator, maintaining clean devices, and managing cryptocurrency storage safely. [t=0:24] [t=33:40] [t=110:84]
